channel.title: Skills on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Skills on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Discovery to Execution: Scaling Agents with Toolboxes and Routines in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry is adding new Toolbox capabilities, including Skills, to help teams discover, manage, and secure tools for production agent workflows. The update is aimed at scaling agents from small-scale use to production execution.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
